script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== Mint AppPublisher token (read-only use) ==='
RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token-appcatalog --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
AT=$(curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=9f4cd925-fcc7-4f42-8dc2-ae98bcad28a6" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access" 2>/dev/null \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
echo "  token: ${#AT} chars"

run_query () {
  local label="$1"; local filter="$2"
  echo "--- $label ---"
  curl -sS -G "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps" \
    --data-urlencode "\$filter=$filter" \
    --data-urlencode '$select=id,displayName,externalId,distributionMethod,publishingState' \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT" 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import json,sys
try:
  d=json.load(sys.stdin)
  if d.get("error"):
    print("  ERROR:", d["error"].get("code"), str(d["error"].get("message",""))[:200])
  else:
    apps=d.get("value",[])
    print(f"  matches: {len(apps)}")
    for a in apps:
      print("   - id=", a.get("id"))
      print("     displayName=", a.get("displayName"))
      print("     externalId=", a.get("externalId"))
      print("     distributionMethod=", a.get("distributionMethod"))
      print("     publishingState=", a.get("publishingState"))
except Exception as e: print("  parse-err:", e)'
}

echo '=== QUERY 1: search by externalId (the manifest.id) ==='
run_query "externalId eq '515f7dd8-cede-4e89-8012-a861e0a71f3d'" \
  "externalId eq '515f7dd8-cede-4e89-8012-a861e0a71f3d'"

echo '=== QUERY 2: displayName eq Kayes AI Agent ==='
run_query "displayName eq 'Kaye''s AI Agent'" \
  "displayName eq 'Kaye''s AI Agent'"

echo '=== QUERY 3: displayName eq Kaye Elamparo ==='
run_query "displayName eq 'Kaye Elamparo'" \
  "displayName eq 'Kaye Elamparo'"

echo '=== QUERY 4: displayName eq Kaye AI (short name from manifest) ==='
run_query "displayName eq 'Kaye AI'" \
  "displayName eq 'Kaye AI'"

echo '=== QUERY 5: direct GET on orphan teamsApp.id (post-mortem on the silent-quarantine) ==='
GET_CODE=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/orphan -w '%{http_code}' \
  "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/c28c52ce-eabe-4db5-a980-01462832d565" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT")
echo "  GET status: $GET_CODE"
echo "  body (first 400 chars):"
head -c 400 /tmp/orphan; echo

echo '=== QUERY 6: $expand=appDefinitions on orphan (sometimes surfaces hidden publishing state) ==='
GET_CODE=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/orphan_exp -w '%{http_code}' \
  "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/c28c52ce-eabe-4db5-a980-01462832d565?\$expand=appDefinitions" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT")
echo "  GET status: $GET_CODE"
head -c 400 /tmp/orphan_exp; echo

echo '===END==='
